name: Employee ID Card Print
css: @page { size: 85.6mm 54mm; margin: 0; } body { font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .id-card { width: 85.6mm; height: 54mm; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2c3e50 0%, #3498db 100%); padding: 4mm; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; flex-direction: column; color: #fff; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .id-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -20mm; right: -20mm; width: 60mm; height: 60mm; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); padding-bottom: 2mm; margin-bottom: 2mm; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .school-name { font-size: 11pt; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; } .card-type { font-size: 7pt; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); padding: 1mm 2mm; border-radius: 3px; } .card-body { display: flex; flex: 1; gap: 3mm; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .photo-section { width: 22mm; height: 28mm; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 3px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); overflow: hidden; } .photo-section img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .photo-placeholder { font-size: 7pt; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-align: center; } .details-section { flex: 1; font-size: 8pt; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; } .detail-row { margin-bottom: 1mm; display: flex; } .detail-label { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); width: 30mm; min-width: 30mm; } .detail-value { font-weight: bold; } .card-footer { text-align: center; font-size: 6pt; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); margin-top: 1mm; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding-top: 1mm; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
html:
{{ frappe.db.get_single_value('Education Settings', 'school_name') or 'BIZAXL SCHOOL' }}
STAFF ID
{% if doc.employee_image %}{% else %}
No Photo
{% endif %}
Name{{ doc.employee_name }}
Designation{{ doc.designation or '' }}
Department{{ doc.department or '' }}
Employee ID{{ doc.employee_id or '' }}
Blood Group{{ doc.blood_group or '' }}
This ID card is the property of the school. If found, please return to the school office.
